title: dryopteris clintoniana var. atropalustris
intro: Dryopteris clintoniana var. atropalustris, also known as Clinton's shield fern, is a rare and variable species of fern found in North America. This plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Clinton's shield fern include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions, and potentially acting as an antimicrobial agent, although more research is needed to confirm its effects. The fern can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, or tinctures, but its use should be done under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional or herbalist due to its rarity and potential side effects.
